data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the status lifecycle (draft, active, suspended, terminated, expired) was not satisfied as there is no evidence provided that checks or confirms the lifecycle statuses of any BAA records. The linked use case mentions the need for BAA status checks, but the prior steps do not include any validation of these statuses, indicating a clear gap in the evidence. Specifically, the evidence pointers do not reference any checks related to the lifecycle statuses, which are critical for confirming compliance with the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of BAA status lifecycle being validated or checked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add lifecycle status validation checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks for BAA status lifecycle (draft, active, suspended, terminated, expired).
